Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Embracing Bayesian methods in clinical trials 95 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. ISBN Visualization 141 upvotes, 20 comments
  3. Explore the Hidden World of Sand 218 upvotes, 36 comments
  4. Capability-Based Security for Redox: Namespace and CWD as Capabilities 43 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. Colorado House passes bill to limit surveillance pricing and wage setting 98 upvotes, 19 comments
  6. Meow.camera 234 upvotes, 57 comments
  7. Installing a Let's Encrypt TLS certificate on a Brother printer with Certbot 208 upvotes, 52 comments
  8. Building FireStriker: Making Civic Tech Free 114 upvotes, 26 comments
  9. Nashville library launches Memory Lab for digitizing home movies 137 upvotes, 33 comments
  10. The bee that everyone wants to save 38 upvotes, 7 comments
  11. Improving Composer through real-time RL 76 upvotes, 19 comments
  12. Desk for people who work at home with a cat 374 upvotes, 138 comments
  13. Velxio 2.0 – Emulate Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi 3 in the Browser 120 upvotes, 41 comments
  14. The Future of SCIP 65 upvotes, 20 comments
  15. .apks are just .zips; semi-legally hacking software for orphaned hardware [video] 18 upvotes, 3 comments
  16. Fets and Crosses: Tic-Tac-Toe built from 2458 discrete transistors 37 upvotes, 10 comments
  17. Anatomy of the .claude/ folder 442 upvotes, 205 comments
  18. LG's new 1Hz display is the secret behind a new laptop's battery life 190 upvotes, 93 comments
  19. AMD's Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition crams 208MB of cache into a single chip 102 upvotes, 49 comments
  20. Show HN: Twitch Roulette – Find live streamers who need views the most 93 upvotes, 44 comments
  21. Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem 213 upvotes, 122 comments
  22. Make macOS consistently bad unironically 364 upvotes, 245 comments
  23. People inside Microsoft are fighting to drop mandatory Microsoft Account 600 upvotes, 436 comments
  24. Everything old is new again: memory optimization 198 upvotes, 136 comments
  25. Hold on to Your Hardware 600 upvotes, 478 comments
  26. Automatically generate all 3D print files for organizing a drawer 42 upvotes, 25 comments
  27. ‘Energy independence feels practical’: Europeans building mini solar farms 256 upvotes, 241 comments
  28. Telnyx package compromised on PyPI 98 upvotes, 102 comments
  29. The Interactive Lost Place Map 10 upvotes, 5 comments
  30. Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director's personal email 206 upvotes, 325 comments

Last generated 2:30pm, 28 March 2026. Source here.
